title: ArchaicFix
description: Swiss army knife of bugfixes and performance improvements for MC 1.7.10
body:
ArchaicFix implements a number of bugfixes and optimizations for Minecraft 1.7.10. Please see the [README on GitHub](https://github.com/embeddedt/ArchaicFix#readme) for a more complete list, but here are a few highlights:

-  Removes/reduces the infamous client-side stuttering in 1.7.10, particularly in biomes with many light updates like jungles
- Backport of the Phosphor lighting engine (the original repository is no longer available, this link leads to my 1.12 fork which is the closest to the original, and still has the original branch)
- An improved version of occlusion culling (not compatible with OF/FC, and thus disabled by default)
- Threaded chunk updates (reduces stutter when placing blocks, also not compatible with OF/FC & disabled by default)
- Many other fixes for various vanilla issues

Additionally, ArchaicFix patches a few common annoyances in other mods.

 
Newer versions of ArchaicFix require a GTNHMixins-compatible mixin loader like UniMixins to be installed.
